items.title: S01E01 - Live As a Family
items.summary: Housekeeper Ida Willis is the terror of the domestic employment agency and her clients alike. She is sent to work for Dr. Robert Price and his wife Angie. Ida tells Angie about her son Shane, who she gave up for adoption as a newborn baby. When they swap baby photos of Robert and Shane, they discover that they are one in the same!

infolabels.title: Live As a Family
infolabels.plot: Housekeeper Ida Willis is the terror of the domestic employment agency and her clients alike. She is sent to work for Dr. Robert Price and his wife Angie. Ida tells Angie about her son Shane, who she gave up for adoption as a newborn baby. When they swap baby photos of Robert and Shane, they discover that they are one in the same!

items.title: S01E02 - Settling In
items.summary: Ida is enjoying working for Shane and Angie. That is, until she meets Shane's 'other mummy' Mrs Price! Will they ever see eye to eye?

infolabels.title: Settling In
infolabels.plot: Ida is enjoying working for Shane and Angie. That is, until she meets Shane's 'other mummy' Mrs Price! Will they ever see eye to eye?

items.title: S01E03 - Is It Catching?
items.summary: Ida agrees to look after her brother's grandchild, unaware of what she's letting herself in for.

infolabels.title: Is It Catching?
infolabels.plot: Ida agrees to look after her brother's grandchild, unaware of what she's letting herself in for.

items.title: S01E04 - Happy Birthdays, Robert
items.summary: Robert's mummies can't agree when he was born. Ida insists he was born in June while Mrs Price is certain that his birthday is when she adopted him. He ends up taking both mummies to dinner and trouble ensues. Can Ida and Mrs Price become friends?

infolabels.title: Happy Birthdays, Robert
infolabels.plot: Robert's mummies can't agree when he was born. Ida insists he was born in June while Mrs Price is certain that his birthday is when she adopted him. He ends up taking both mummies to dinner and trouble ensues. Can Ida and Mrs Price become friends?

items.title: S01E05 - Driven Apart
items.summary: Robert is starting to regret having agreed to teach Angie how to drive. Mrs Price thinks it's funny that Angie has hit another car, until she realises whose car she's hit.

infolabels.title: Driven Apart
infolabels.plot: Robert is starting to regret having agreed to teach Angie how to drive. Mrs Price thinks it's funny that Angie has hit another car, until she realises whose car she's hit.

items.title: S01E06 - Think Thin
items.summary: Robert thinks that he, Angie, and Ida need to lose weight, so he devises a diet for them all to follow. Ida's not happy as this means she can't even have her usual G&T. When Ida discovers that Robert has been eating secretly at the hospital, she puts a stop to the diet for good!

infolabels.title: Think Thin
infolabels.plot: Robert thinks that he, Angie, and Ida need to lose weight, so he devises a diet for them all to follow. Ida's not happy as this means she can't even have her usual G&T. When Ida discovers that Robert has been eating secretly at the hospital, she puts a stop to the diet for good!

items.title: S02E01 - Only When It Hurts
items.summary: When Mrs Prive comes for tea, Ida is showing off her talents when she breaks her tooth biting into one of 'other mummy's sausage rolls. How will she get on at her first dentist visit in 28 years?

infolabels.title: Only When It Hurts
infolabels.plot: When Mrs Prive comes for tea, Ida is showing off her talents when she breaks her tooth biting into one of 'other mummy's sausage rolls. How will she get on at her first dentist visit in 28 years?

items.title: S02E02 - Wakey Wakey
items.summary: Ida agrees to participate in a wakeathon to raise money for a worthy cause. She decides she needs a long sleep beforehand but has trouble so she employs sleeping pills. However, the police come knocking that there may be a bomb in the building and they all must evacuate!

infolabels.title: Wakey Wakey
infolabels.plot: Ida agrees to participate in a wakeathon to raise money for a worthy cause. She decides she needs a long sleep beforehand but has trouble so she employs sleeping pills. However, the police come knocking that there may be a bomb in the building and they all must evacuate!

items.title: S02E03 - A Holiday Romance
items.summary: Ida goes on holiday with Robert and Angie, and meets a gentleman named Cyril, who Robert takes an instant dislike to. Robert spends the holiday spying on his mother and her new beau.

infolabels.title: A Holiday Romance
infolabels.plot: Ida goes on holiday with Robert and Angie, and meets a gentleman named Cyril, who Robert takes an instant dislike to. Robert spends the holiday spying on his mother and her new beau.

items.title: S02E04 - A Brush with the Law
items.summary: When Ida sets out to change Angie's blouse for 'a sky-blue floaty scarf', she accidentally leaves without paying. The manager calls the police after he's aggravated by Robert. During her court appearance, Ida quotes from a book, which turns out to be written by the magistrate.

infolabels.title: A Brush with the Law
infolabels.plot: When Ida sets out to change Angie's blouse for 'a sky-blue floaty scarf', she accidentally leaves without paying. The manager calls the police after he's aggravated by Robert. During her court appearance, Ida quotes from a book, which turns out to be written by the magistrate.

items.title: S02E05 - Down Under
items.summary: Ida's name somehow finds its way onto the computer at the employment agency and she's sick of calls from a Mrs. Thornberry-Basset, aka 'Fancy Drawers'. She's quick to inform them she does not want to work, but then she misinterprets a call about moving to Australia. She informs Mrs Price that Robert and Angie are leaving them, creating a very complex web of misunderstanding.

infolabels.title: Down Under
infolabels.plot: Ida's name somehow finds its way onto the computer at the employment agency and she's sick of calls from a Mrs. Thornberry-Basset, aka 'Fancy Drawers'. She's quick to inform them she does not want to work, but then she misinterprets a call about moving to Australia. She informs Mrs Price that Robert and Angie are leaving them, creating a very complex web of misunderstanding.

items.title: S02E06 - To Catch a Thief
items.summary: The TV breaks just as Ida and Angie are settling down to watch a film. When a man arrives, Ida thinks Robert has called a repairman, but soon finds out that he's someone else entirely.

infolabels.title: To Catch a Thief
infolabels.plot: The TV breaks just as Ida and Angie are settling down to watch a film. When a man arrives, Ida thinks Robert has called a repairman, but soon finds out that he's someone else entirely.

items.title: S02E07 - Go Jump in the Fountain
items.summary: When Angie insists that Robert go out for 'an evening with the boys', she and Ida have no idea just how far out of his rut he will get!

infolabels.title: Go Jump in the Fountain
infolabels.plot: When Angie insists that Robert go out for 'an evening with the boys', she and Ida have no idea just how far out of his rut he will get!

items.title: S02E08 - Invitation to the Wedding
items.summary: Wilfred gets a whack with a loaf when he lets himself into the house while everyone's out shopping. He informs them his daughter Maureen is going to marry a drummer in a steel band. Robert insists on not going, but when Ida and Angie forget their present, he comes to the rescue and makes quite the impression.

infolabels.title: Invitation to the Wedding
infolabels.plot: Wilfred gets a whack with a loaf when he lets himself into the house while everyone's out shopping. He informs them his daughter Maureen is going to marry a drummer in a steel band. Robert insists on not going, but when Ida and Angie forget their present, he comes to the rescue and makes quite the impression.

items.title: S02E09 - Cold Turkey
items.summary: Ida plans a small Christmas, but, one by one, people start inviting themselves, and Ida foolishly leaves the Turkey in Wilfred's hands.

infolabels.title: Cold Turkey
infolabels.plot: Ida plans a small Christmas, but, one by one, people start inviting themselves, and Ida foolishly leaves the Turkey in Wilfred's hands.

items.title: S03E01 - Where There's a Will
items.summary: Ida discovers that she's been left a cottage in a will from none other than 'Shane's daddy', but their arrival is met with an even bigger surprise.

infolabels.title: Where There's a Will
infolabels.plot: Ida discovers that she's been left a cottage in a will from none other than 'Shane's daddy', but their arrival is met with an even bigger surprise.

items.title: S03E02 - Baby Blues
items.summary: Angie's cousins have had a baby, and made her and Robert godparents. Following the ceremony, she decides she wants a baby, but Robert doesn't.

infolabels.title: Baby Blues
infolabels.plot: Angie's cousins have had a baby, and made her and Robert godparents. Following the ceremony, she decides she wants a baby, but Robert doesn't.

items.title: S03E03 - The Big Night Out
items.summary: Ida is infuriated when consultant Charles Barber invites Mrs Price to dinner, especially after some digging, she realises that she is the intended date.

infolabels.title: The Big Night Out
infolabels.plot: Ida is infuriated when consultant Charles Barber invites Mrs Price to dinner, especially after some digging, she realises that she is the intended date.

items.title: S03E04 - Light and Shade
items.summary: Home on holiday in Bournemouth, Mrs Price has joined a cult and starts handing her wealth over to Brother Laidlaw. Suspicious, Ida sets a trap.

infolabels.title: Light and Shade
infolabels.plot: Home on holiday in Bournemouth, Mrs Price has joined a cult and starts handing her wealth over to Brother Laidlaw. Suspicious, Ida sets a trap.

items.title: S03E05 - Unfair Dismissal
items.summary: When handyman Jim Barnes is given his marching orders, Ida refuses to accept the decision and devises a plan to get him reinstated.

infolabels.title: Unfair Dismissal
infolabels.plot: When handyman Jim Barnes is given his marching orders, Ida refuses to accept the decision and devises a plan to get him reinstated.

items.title: S03E06 - Dirty Linen
items.summary: Ida finds a 'love letter' in Robert's pocket, and everyone mutually jumps to that he's having an affair. Who is the mystery woman?

infolabels.title: Dirty Linen
infolabels.plot: Ida finds a 'love letter' in Robert's pocket, and everyone mutually jumps to that he's having an affair. Who is the mystery woman?

items.title: S03E07 - Ring If You Need Me
items.summary: Ida waits on bedridden Mrs Price hand and foot, but goodwill only stretches so far.

infolabels.title: Ring If You Need Me
infolabels.plot: Ida waits on bedridden Mrs Price hand and foot, but goodwill only stretches so far.

items.title: S03E08 - Little Donkey
items.summary: Robert's musical plans are thrown into disarray when he discovers one of the nurses is already singing 'Little Donkey' at the hospital Christmas concert. Wilfred helpfully suggests an alternative act: mind reading!

infolabels.title: Little Donkey
infolabels.plot: Robert's musical plans are thrown into disarray when he discovers one of the nurses is already singing 'Little Donkey' at the hospital Christmas concert. Wilfred helpfully suggests an alternative act: mind reading!

items.title: S04E01 - Moving Out
items.summary: Robert has finally got an opportunity to work as a GP in a private practice. But it means moving to Yorkshire. How's his 'other mother' going to take the news?

infolabels.title: Moving Out
infolabels.plot: Robert has finally got an opportunity to work as a GP in a private practice. But it means moving to Yorkshire. How's his 'other mother' going to take the news?

items.title: S04E02 - Moving In
items.summary: The journey to Yorkshire proves to be extremely fraught, the car breaks down several times, and secretary Edith Parfitt gets more and more worried.

infolabels.title: Moving In
infolabels.plot: The journey to Yorkshire proves to be extremely fraught, the car breaks down several times, and secretary Edith Parfitt gets more and more worried.

items.title: S04E03 - What Seems to Be the Trouble
items.summary: Ida misses London life and struggles with the new slower-paced country life. She plans to pack her bags but a medical emergency soon changes her mind.

infolabels.title: What Seems to Be the Trouble
infolabels.plot: Ida misses London life and struggles with the new slower-paced country life. She plans to pack her bags but a medical emergency soon changes her mind.

items.title: S04E04 - Friendship View Marriage
items.summary: Mrs Price and Wilfred plan a visit; when they arrive, Wilfred tells Ida he's set to propose to his 'Passion Flower', but his eye is elsewhere.

infolabels.title: Friendship View Marriage
infolabels.plot: Mrs Price and Wilfred plan a visit; when they arrive, Wilfred tells Ida he's set to propose to his 'Passion Flower', but his eye is elsewhere.

items.title: S04E05 - Hello Young Mothers
items.summary: At the local corner shop, Ida overhears plans for a hostel for single mothers. She has to take on fiercely opposed shopkeeper Mrs Cross.

infolabels.title: Hello Young Mothers
infolabels.plot: At the local corner shop, Ida overhears plans for a hostel for single mothers. She has to take on fiercely opposed shopkeeper Mrs Cross.

items.title: S04E06 - The Phantom of the Farmyard
items.summary: Lonely in London, Mrs Price visits, intending to move in. Robert, Angie and Ida concoct a plan to put her off, a phantom rooster.

infolabels.title: The Phantom of the Farmyard
infolabels.plot: Lonely in London, Mrs Price visits, intending to move in. Robert, Angie and Ida concoct a plan to put her off, a phantom rooster.

items.title: S04E07 - Surprise, Surprise
items.summary: Ida drops some not-too-subtle hints that her birthday is approaching and tells Angie she wants a big strong man to carry her away. When the big day arrives, she's left wondering if she'll ever get what she really wants.

infolabels.title: Surprise, Surprise
infolabels.plot: Ida drops some not-too-subtle hints that her birthday is approaching and tells Angie she wants a big strong man to carry her away. When the big day arrives, she's left wondering if she'll ever get what she really wants.

items.title: S05E01 - Digging In
items.summary: Wilfred has vanished, leaving his sister Ida distraught. But after being found, he invades a nearby empty house, wielding a musket. He ends up buying the property and working as the local gravedigger.

infolabels.title: Digging In
infolabels.plot: Wilfred has vanished, leaving his sister Ida distraught. But after being found, he invades a nearby empty house, wielding a musket. He ends up buying the property and working as the local gravedigger.

items.title: S05E02 - Drugs on the Market
items.summary: Ida's been stockpiling tablets and even trading under the counter for different supplies. Unimpressed, Robert is seeks to end the operation.

infolabels.title: Drugs on the Market
infolabels.plot: Ida's been stockpiling tablets and even trading under the counter for different supplies. Unimpressed, Robert is seeks to end the operation.

items.title: S05E03 - Jezebel
items.summary: Robert's talk to the Young Wives Group is hampered by one who takes a fancy to him, much to Ida's horror.

infolabels.title: Jezebel
infolabels.plot: Robert's talk to the Young Wives Group is hampered by one who takes a fancy to him, much to Ida's horror.

items.title: S05E04 - Something to Love
items.summary: Ida is thrilled when romance finally enlivens Miss Edith's life.

infolabels.title: Something to Love
infolabels.plot: Ida is thrilled when romance finally enlivens Miss Edith's life.

items.title: S05E05 - The Bypass
items.summary: A new bypass threatens chaos to the village; Ida and Robert are determined to take action and end up dancing in the middle of Main Street.

infolabels.title: The Bypass
infolabels.plot: A new bypass threatens chaos to the village; Ida and Robert are determined to take action and end up dancing in the middle of Main Street.

items.title: S05E06 - Happy Anniversary
items.summary: It's Robert and Angie's wedding anniversary. Angie has been spending most of her time away working in ads. Their anniversary dinner is spoilt when she must fly to Paris for a new commercial.

infolabels.title: Happy Anniversary
infolabels.plot: It's Robert and Angie's wedding anniversary. Angie has been spending most of her time away working in ads. Their anniversary dinner is spoilt when she must fly to Paris for a new commercial.

items.title: S05E07 - Two Lonely People
items.summary: Wilfred and Miss Edith are two lonely people, especially Edith since her mother left to stay with Edith's sister. Perhaps wedding bells will be ringing in the not too distant future.

infolabels.title: Two Lonely People
infolabels.plot: Wilfred and Miss Edith are two lonely people, especially Edith since her mother left to stay with Edith's sister. Perhaps wedding bells will be ringing in the not too distant future.
